title: Romantic Jammy Vietnamese Custard Wrap
description: A sweet and delicate wrap featuring a spherified custard filling, crispy fresh herbs, and fragrant lotus leaves.

ingredients.name: Spherified custard
ingredients.notes: Made with agar agar and coconut milk.

instructions: Prepare the lotus leaves by washing and drying them thoroughly.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together the coconut milk, granulated sugar, lemon juice, and salt.
In a small bowl, whisk together the agar agar and cornstarch until well combined.
Add the agar agar mixture to the coconut milk mixture and whisk until smooth.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg yolks, vanilla extract, and unsalted butter until smooth.
Temper the egg yolk mixture by slowly pouring the warm custard mixture into the egg yolks, whisking constantly.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl.
Spherify the custard by dropping small amounts of the mixture into a bowl of cold water.
Once the spherified custard has formed, remove it from the water with a slotted spoon and set aside.
To assemble the wrap, lay a lotus leaf flat on a work surface and spread a small amount of the spherified custard in the center of the leaf.
Top the custard with fresh herbs and fold the lotus leaf over the filling to form a neat package.
